title: BookConfig
description: Top-level book metadata. Mirrors packages/core/src/models/book.ts BookConfigSchema.

id.description: Unique book identifier (UUID or slug). Used as directory name under books/.

platform.description: Publishing platform. Determines default genre and pacing conventions.

genre.description: Genre identifier matching a built-in or custom genre profile (e.g. xuanhuan, litrpg, cultivation).

chapterWordCount.description: Target word count per chapter. Normalization band is +/-10% of this value.

language.description: Primary language: zh (Chinese) | en (English). Affects word counting, punctuation rules, and genre defaults.

fanficMode.description: Fan fiction mode, null for original fiction. Activates conditional audit dimensions 34-37.

parentBookId.description: For spinoff books, the ID of the parent book whose truth files are shared for canon consistency.

consolidationThreshold.description: Number of chapter summaries per volume before consolidation triggers. Default: 50. Null to disable.

maxAuditRetries.description: Maximum number of revision rounds in the audit-revise loop. Default: 2.

pauseAfterConsecutiveFailures.description: If consecutive chapters fail audit after max retries, pause and prompt user. Default: 3.

qualityGates.description: Quality gate configuration for the audit-revise loop. If omitted, defaults are used.

chapterCount.description: Current chapter count. Updated by pipeline after write/rewrite/undo.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the book was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the book was last modified.
